stem: A circle in the xy-plane has its center at (−1, 1). Line t is tangent to this circle at the point (5, −4). Which of the following points also lies on line t ?
explanation: The radius from (−1, 1) to (5, −4) has slope (−4 − 1)/(5 − (−1)) = −5/6. A tangent line is perpendicular to the radius at the point of tangency, so line t has slope 6/5. The segment from (5, −4) to (10, 2) has slope (2 − (−4))/(10 − 5) = 6/5, so (10, 2) lies on line t.
